{{Quote|He says it came from the Old Recluse. He lives up in a cave in the high Tatmana. Apparently knows everything about what goes on in the galaxy.|Tycho Celchu to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
The '''Old Recluse''' was an ancient [[Morish]] spy for the [[Imperial Remnant]] at the end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
{{Quote|Ka'alee!|The Old Recluse attacking his visitors after Lando Calrissian uncovered the source of his clairvoyance|<ref name="Specter of the Past" />}}
He resided in a [[Old Recluse's cave|cave]], an abandoned secret communications centre once used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], in the higher parts of the [[Tatmana Mountains]]. He used the cave's old equipment to act as a kind of prophet in order to impress and indoctrinate the Morish population. He also spied on the neighbouring [[Morishim New Republic starfighter base|New Republic installation]].

The trick was discovered by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] when he went to the cave with [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], and [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. The Old Recluse tried to sell them the story of the [[Caamas Firestorm|Destruction of Caamas]] for 300 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Calrissian smelled and recognized the odor of the old electronic equipment, which he likened to the smell of the [[Spaarti Creations|Spaarti]] [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|plant]] on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. The Old Recluse attempted to shoot Calrissian, but was arrested and disarmed.
